text.title: fine-tuning-lora Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for fine-tuning-lora as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Training on the full conversation history including previous assistant turns as loss targets.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Including previous assistant turns in the loss function teaches the model to predict its own prior outputs, which creates self-reinforcing patterns and increases hallucination. Use DataCollatorForCompletionOnlyLM to mask all tokens except the final assistant response.
